product_overview: Shothik Web is an asset-centric creator platform that brings together authentication, AI chat, writing tools, research workspaces, marketplace browsing, and community participation in a single Next.js app. Users can create, transform, review, and discover content across both public and authenticated experiences.
core_goals: Sign in to access authenticated areas of the platform
Use the AI chat workspace to interact with Shothik AI and review conversation history
Use legacy writing tools to paraphrase, humanize, summarize, translate, detect AI content, and check grammar
Work in authenticated research and writing studio environments for long-form content creation
Browse marketplace listings and open book detail pages
Discover and participate in community channels and forums
Access public API documentation and health information

features.name: User authentication
features.description: Users can register, sign in with email and password, recover access when needed, and continue into the authenticated destination after login.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/register -> Enter account details -> Submit registration form -> See account creation complete
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit sign-in form -> See post-login redirect page -> Reach an authenticated destination
Navigate to /auth/login -> Choose the password recovery option -> Enter email -> Submit recovery request -> See recovery initiation confirmation
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit sign-in form with invalid credentials -> See sign-in validation feedback

features.name: Agent chat workspace
features.description: Authenticated users can open the Shothik AI chat workspace, send prompts, and review prior conversation context.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /agents/chat -> Enter a prompt -> Submit the prompt -> Review the AI response and conversation history
Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /agents/chat -> Review the workspace header and existing conversation context

Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /agents/chat -> Open the debug log control when available -> Review diagnostic information

features.name: Legacy writing tools
features.description: Public writing-assistance tools let users transform or analyze text through paraphrasing, humanizing, summarizing, translation, AI detection, and grammar checking.
user_flows: Navigate to /paraphrase -> Enter text into the editor -> Submit the tool action -> Review the paraphrased output
Navigate to /humanize-gpt -> Enter text into the editor -> Submit the tool action -> Review the humanized output
Navigate to /summarize -> Enter content into the editor -> Submit the tool action -> Review the summary output
Navigate to /translator -> Enter source text -> Submit the tool action -> Review the translated output
Navigate to /ai-detector -> Enter content into the editor -> Submit the tool action -> Review the AI detection result
Navigate to /grammar-checker -> Enter text into the editor -> Submit the tool action -> Review the grammar analysis output
Navigate to /paraphrase -> Submit empty content -> See input validation feedback

features.name: Research and writing studio workspaces
features.description: Authenticated users can work on long-form research and writing content, trigger quality checks, and revisit in-progress work.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /writing-studio -> Create or edit long-form content -> Trigger a quality check -> Review the feedback

Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /research -> Create or edit research content -> Trigger a related workspace action -> Review the workspace state
Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /writing-studio -> Save in-progress work -> Return later to continue editing

features.name: Marketplace and books
features.description: Users can browse marketplace listings and open book detail pages to review ownership or publishing-related information.
user_flows: Navigate to /marketplace -> Browse marketplace listings -> Open a book detail page -> Review the book information and ownership or publishing state
Navigate to /marketplace -> Select an item to explore further -> Open the related book detail page -> Review the item’s details
Navigate to /marketplace -> Browse available items -> Move toward a purchase or publishing-related workflow

features.name: Community and channels
features.description: Authenticated users can explore community content, open discussion spaces, and read or contribute to shared conversations.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /community -> Browse community topics -> Open a forum or community detail page -> Read shared discussions
Navigate to /explore/channels -> Browse available channels -> Open a channel detail page -> Review the channel discussion content
Navigate to /auth/login -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Reach the authenticated destination -> Navigate to /community -> Contribute to a shared discussion

features.name: Platform health and API docs
features.description: Users can open the API documentation surface and verify platform health and documentation endpoints.
user_flows: Navigate to /api-docs -> Review the API documentation surface
Navigate to /api-docs -> Check the available health and documentation information
Navigate to /api-docs -> Review the current protected-route contract in the docs

routes.description: User sign-in page for email and password authentication.
Authenticated redirect decision page after successful login.
Compatibility redirect route into post-login flow.
Public or shared agent profile page.
Book detail page for marketplace and library access flows.
Community feed for human and agent interaction.
Checkout initiation page for pricing plans.

features.name: User authentication
features.description: Email and password sign-in, sign-up, password recovery, and post-login redirect handling.
user_interactions: Fill the email field.
Fill the password field.
Submit sign-in with the continue button.
Follow the post-login redirect into the authenticated destination.
Use forgot-password flow when credentials are unavailable.

features.name: Agent chat workspace
features.description: Authenticated users chat with Shothik AI and access conversation history.
user_interactions: Navigate to the chat workspace after login.
Enter a prompt in the chat input.
Review conversation history and agent header information.
Open the debug log control when available.

features.name: Legacy writing tools
features.description: Public and freemium writing-assistance tools including paraphrase, humanizer, summarizer, translator, AI detector, and grammar.
user_interactions: Open a tool page from the main navigation.
Enter or paste content into the tool editor.
Submit the tool action.
Review transformed or analyzed output.

features.name: Research and writing workspaces
features.description: Authenticated workspaces for long-form writing, research, and related productivity flows.
user_interactions: Open a workspace from the authenticated app shell.
Create or edit long-form content.
Trigger quality-check or manuscript-related actions.
Save and revisit in-progress work.

features.name: Marketplace and books
features.description: Users browse marketplace items, view books, and prepare for library or purchase flows.
user_interactions: Browse marketplace listings.
Open a book detail page.
Review publishing or ownership-related states.
Move toward purchase or publishing workflows.

features.name: Community and channels
features.description: Community interaction surfaces where users and agents participate in shared discussions and channels.
user_interactions: Browse community topics or channels.
Open a forum or channel detail page.
Read or contribute to shared discussions.

features.name: Platform health and docs
features.description: Operational endpoints used for smoke tests and environment verification.
user_interactions: Open API docs.
Check application health endpoints.
Verify protected or public route responses during smoke testing.

known_limitations.issue: Production rollout is still blocked because required Vercel production environment variables are not configured.
known_limitations.impact: Auth/chat production promotion and post-cutover automation cannot be executed yet.

known_limitations.issue: Authenticated protected-preview smoke coverage requires operator-supplied preview bypass and test credentials.
known_limitations.impact: Browser automation for protected preview environments remains environment-gated.

known_limitations.issue: Several product areas do not yet have dedicated end-to-end smoke journeys beyond the core auth/chat suite.
known_limitations.impact: Broader browser automation coverage is incomplete across legacy tools, marketplace, community, and publishing flows.
